mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBM.ID = TBP.MEMBER_ID
SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBM.ID = TBP.MEMBER_ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POST (ID, POST_TITLE), POST_CONTENT, MEMBER_ID, POST_READ_COUNT) VALUES (SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{memberId}, 0)
